welcome.title: Welcome to Google Drive!
welcome.subtitle: Get the most out of Drive, right from your computer
welcome.feature_secure_title:
Securely store files and folders
in the cloud
welcome.feature_app_title:
Open Drive files with apps
on your computer
welcome.feature_sync_title:
Automatically keep all of your
files up to date

signin.title: Sign in to get started
signin.subtitle: To start using Drive, sign in or create a new Google account

sync_folder.title: Choose folders to sync from your computer to Drive
sync_folder.subtitle: Sync folders from your computer to Google Drive so you can access them from any device
sync_folder.info_bar: Edits made to synced folders will automatically be saved in Drive

sync_folder_confirm.title: These folders will sync to Google Drive
sync_folder_confirm.subtitle: The selected folders will start to sync once setup is complete
sync_folder_confirm.info_bar: Edits made to synced folders will automatically be saved in Drive

photos.title: Back up photos and videos to Google Photos
photos.subtitle: Additionally, you can choose folders to back up to Google Photos
photos.info_bar: When you edit photos or videos on your computer, they'll be backed up as new files

folder_summary.title_drive: These folders will sync to Drive
folder_summary.title_both: These folders will sync to Drive and back up to Photos
folder_summary.title_photos: These folders will back up to Google Photos
folder_summary.subtitle: The folders will start to sync once setup is complete
folder_summary.info_bar: The folders will start to sync once setup is complete

file_manager.title: Your Drive files are just a click away in {{fmName}}
file_manager.subtitle: Your files will show up in {{fmName}} without taking up hard drive space. You can access them anytime you're connected to the internet.

offline.title: Make important files available for offline use
offline.subtitle: Your files are otherwise only available when you have an internet connection
offline.step1_label: Right-click on a file or folder

steps.see_files: See Drive files in File Manager

home.shared_files_desc: See all files and folders that have been shared with you.
home.caught_up_desc: Things that need your attention will show up here

notifications_page.title: Notifications
notifications_page.caught_up_desc: Things that need your attention will show up here
notifications_page.storage_usage: {{percent}}% of your Google Drive storage is used

preferences.title: Google Drive Preferences
preferences.syncing_from_folders: Syncing files from {{count}} folder(s) to Computers
preferences.backing_up_folders: Backing up photos and videos from {{count}} folder(s)
preferences.stream_desc: Files are stored in the cloud. You can open them from your computer without using hard drive space.
preferences.mirror_desc: Files are stored both in the cloud and on your computer. You can access files at any time, even without internet.
preferences.streaming_info: Streaming uses less hard drive space. Only use hard drive space when you open files or make files available offline.
preferences.choose_storage: Choose how files are stored on this computer
preferences.folders_from_computer: Folders from your computer are being synced to Google Drive

offline_files.title: Manage offline files
offline_files.description: Hard drive space is used to store files you make available offline and files that you've recently opened. You can free up space by removing offline access to these files or managing your cache.
offline_files.no_offline_files: You don't have any files saved for offline use yet.

error_list.title: Error list
error_list.no_errors: Errors related to backing up or syncing your files will show up here

about.title: About
about.copyright: Copyright © {{year}} Google LLC. All rights reserved.

feedback.title: Send feedback to Drive
feedback.description: We welcome problem reports, feature ideas and general comments. Please note that we are unable to respond directly to feedback reports.
feedback.in_discussion_group: I'm in the Drive discussion group
feedback.privacy_notice: This feedback is sent to Google and subject to the
feedback.privacy_suffix: . We'll use your feedback to improve Google products and services.

account_prefs.title: Account Preferences
account_prefs.realtime_presence_desc: See if someone else is editing a shared Microsoft Office file
account_prefs.choose_storage: Choose how files are stored on this computer
account_prefs.stream_desc: Files are stored in the cloud. You can open them from your computer without using hard drive space.
account_prefs.mirror_desc: Files are stored both in the cloud and on your computer.
account_prefs.streaming_info: Streaming uses less hard drive space. Only use hard drive space when you open files or make files available offline.
account_prefs.launch_on_login_desc: Launch Google Drive when you login to your computer
account_prefs.hotkey_hint: To change a hotkey, select the key combination and then type the new hotkey.
account_prefs.telemetry_desc: Automatically send diagnostic logs to Google when Drive for desktop encounters a problem
account_prefs.prompt_backup: Prompt me to back up devices
account_prefs.folders_syncing: Folders from your computer are being synced to Google Drive
account_prefs.backing_up_count: Backing up photos and videos from {{count}} folder(s)

errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: This file couldn't be uploaded. Check your connection and try again.
errors.DOWNLOAD_FAILED: This file couldn't be downloaded. Check your connection and try again.
errors.RESTRICTED: This file can't be synced because it's restricted by Google. View the file's sharing settings to see who has access.
errors.UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred while syncing this file.
